About Ashvi Facility Management

We Will Make Any Place Completely Neat And Tidy

Ashvi Facility Management Services was incorporated on 19th June, 2018. We have always believed in building and maintain long term relationships.Our very first project was with a very distinguished company in the Events & Exhibitions Industry in India – Lallooji & Sons. Our work started gaining momentum when we started working with them in GUCEC Ahmedabad and various other events and conferences organized by them.

Our hard work paid off, we proved our worth and got an opportunity in India’s major pilgrimage and religious festival by providing 100+ janitors which we completed successfully.

Read More
About Us

We Will Make Absolutely Any Place Clean, Neat

Our Services

Once Our Customer, Always Our Customer

Housekeeping
Service

If you prefer your surroundings to be clean and when it comes to consistency, a housekeeper will be the perfect choice.They will be maintaining the cleanliness of corporate , banquet and societies.

Read More

Carpet/Chair/Sofa Cleaning Services

Surfaces like carpets, sofas and chairs are prone to wear and tear and spillage. It is only possible to take limited care of the same. It is impossible to stop movement in the house or office.

Read More

Mechanized
Housekeeping Services

Mechanized housekeeping services encompass everything from dusting and mopping to thorough cleaning of floors, window panels, and glasses, as well as floor scrubbing, polishing etc.

Read More

Why Choose Us

We Believe In Taking Care Of Your Premises With Thorough Professionalism.

We complete our tasks with utmost efficiency with the right use of technology and resources. We provide quality services and take our job seriously to leave no stone unturned to deliver our best.

  • Neat & Cleaning Top Service
  • We Provide Qualified & Expert Team
  • No Obligation - May Stop At Any Time!

Our Prestigious Clients

Testimonials

Hear From Our Clients

Ashvi Facility Management has acted as a saviour for us. They have been so efficient with their work especially during the pandemic with their Housekeeping services that our process has been hassle free and we could ensure safety for all our employees and workers.

Deepanshu

Happy Customer

We had contacted Ashvi Facility Management for housekeeping services at Kumbhmela at Prayagraj in 2019. It was a big matter of concern as an event of such huge calibre requires a lot of services in terms of cleanliness but the team from Ashvi came and took care of the surrounding and gave us a sigh of relief. Huge thanks to them!

Neeraj Raina

Manager

We had contacted Ashvi Facility Management for housekeeping services at Kumbhmela at Prayagraj in 2019. With our busy lifestyle, it is not possible to the essential job of cleaning, but the team at Ashvi made sure that both premises look spic and span, with all corners and surfaces neat and tidy. Thank you to the entire team at Ashvi Facility Management for doing a wonderful job.

Nikhil Agrawal

Partner

I approached Ashvi Facility Management for House keeping Cleaning Service in Kumbh 2019 , Prayagraj. Both before and after the event I need someone to take care of the cleanliness of the premises. Ashvi Facility Management steps in here and does not leave a chance for any complaints for their housekeeping services. I am extremely thankful to them for making my job easier.

Sagar Patel

Operation Manager
